content.query:
-- database (logical container of related schemas/external tables/) creation
-- Default schema where our tables are referred (dbo - database owner)
create DATABASE synapsetraining;

use synapsetraining;

-- to list the database names
select name from sys.databases;

--How the table is accessed hierarchy in the Azure Synapse: dbname.schemaname.tablename
select * from vaniwd36.dbo.CallerDetails;

--https (Object/Blob storage &slow)
--openrowset : it is function to query data from underlying filesystem (datalake)
--(instructing SQL engine to not consider data is inline in the SQL DB,
-- rather it is in a open filesystem of set of files) 
--will instruct Synapse to access the large volume of data as a rowset using SQL engine
SELECT *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://vanistorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/container1/landing-zone/cust_hist_1.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]

-- 1. Create the File Format (tells SQL how to read the CSV)
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [CSV_Format]
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS (
        FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
        STRING_DELIMITER = '"',
        FIRST_ROW = 2, -- Skips the header row
        USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = FALSE
    )
);

-- 2. Create the Data Source (points to your specific container)
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [ADS_Container1]
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'https://vanistorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/container1'
);

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.CallerDetails (
    [call_id] NVARCHAR(50),
    [caller_id] BIGINT,
    [receiver_id] BIGINT,
    [duration] INT,
    [call_type] NVARCHAR(20),
    [tower_id] NVARCHAR(20),
    [timestamp] DATETIME2,
    [cost] DECIMAL(10, 2)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'landing-zone/cust_hist_1.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = [ADS_Container1], -- Must match the name created in Step 1
    FILE_FORMAT = [CSV_Format]      -- Must match the name created in Step 1
);

-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://vanistorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/container1/landing-zone/cust_hist_1.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]
